title: Thunder at Sinai
tagline: the mountain that could not be touched
technique: canvas 2D — procedural lightning, particle smoke

title: Until Dawn
tagline: Torah letters falling through the night until dawn
technique: generative Hebrew typography, canvas 2D

title: Where You Go
tagline: Ruth and Naomi in the fields of Bethlehem
technique: canvas 2D — flow field, Perlin noise, wheat stalk simulation

title: Engraved in Stone
tagline: two tablets, ten words, one covenant
technique: SVG with filter effects, carved Hebrew typography

title: A Land Flowing
tagline: milk and honey — the promise made visible
technique: reaction-diffusion (Gray-Scott)

title: We Will Do and We Will Hear
tagline: the two words of Israel's covenant, shattered into light
technique: Voronoi diagram with Hebrew typography

title: The Greening of the House
tagline: plants growing from seed at the foot of the mountain
technique: L-system turtle graphics

title: The Crowns
tagline: the ornamental tagin drawn onto Torah letters at Sinai
technique: canvas 2D pen-plotter, hand-drawn stroke simulation

title: Sheva Minim
tagline: the seven species of the Land, arranged as a wreath
technique: SVG botanical illustration

title: Forty-Nine Fires
tagline: counting the days toward Shavuot, one fire at a time
technique: canvas 2D — Archimedean spiral, radial gradient animation

title: Chag HaKatzir
tagline: bound wheat sheaves at harvest — the festival of the harvest
technique: canvas 2D stipple / halftone dot-density rendering

title: Wherever You Go
tagline: Ruth and Naomi walking toward Bethlehem, in truchet tiles
theme: The Book of Ruth / Loyalty and Harvest
technique: truchet tiles, figure silhouette inlay

title: Keter Torah
tagline: the crown of Torah, written by pendulums in decay
technique: harmonograph, dual-pendulum Lissajous decay curves

title: I Declare
tagline: the Bikkurim procession — first fruits offered at the Temple on Shavuot
technique: canvas 2D recursive subdivision, quadtree mosaic

title: The Ten Words
tagline: Aseret HaDibrot — engraved in stone, burning with living fire
technique: canvas 2D SDF-style glyph glow, Hebrew typography

title: Growing Louder
tagline: the shofar at Sinai — a voice that grew louder and louder
technique: canvas 2D additive waveform synthesis, oscilloscope animation

title: Your People, My People
tagline: Ruth's road from Moab to Bethlehem traced as a Hilbert space-filling curve
theme: Book of Ruth / Loyalty and Journey
technique: canvas 2D Hilbert curve space-filling animation

title: The Mountain as Canopy
tagline: Sinai as ketubah — the mountain held over Israel like a wedding canopy
technique: SVG generative ornamental border, Hebrew calligraphic typography

title: The Open Corner
tagline: pe'ah — the field corner left unharvested for the poor and the stranger
technique: canvas 2D flow-field animation, Perlin noise, wheat stalk rendering

title: Before the Words
tagline: the 22 Hebrew letters assembling from scattered gold particles — before the Akdamut piyyut
theme: Tikkun Leil Shavuot / Torah and Devotion
technique: canvas 2D particle-swarm letter assembly, Hebrew/Aramaic typography

title: The Mountain in Bloom
tagline: the mountain that burst into flower at the moment of revelation
technique: canvas 2D L-system plant growth, turtle-graphics branching, lightning animation

title: Two Loaves
tagline: the wave offering of Shavuot — two leavened loaves as wave interference
technique: canvas 2D wave superposition, ImageData pixel manipulation, Moiré interference

title: Black Fire on White Fire
tagline: the primordial Torah — twenty-two letters burning before the world was made
technique: canvas 2D probabilistic cellular automaton, Hebrew letter rasterization

title: All Souls Were Present
tagline: every Jewish soul across all generations gathered at Sinai — diffusion-limited aggregation
theme: Matan Torah / The Covenant Across All Generations
technique: canvas 2D diffusion-limited aggregation (DLA), on-lattice Brownian motion

title: The Fiftieth Day
tagline: שָׁבוּעוֹת traced by Fourier epicycles — the word as a sum of rotating circles
theme: Shavuot — the Fiftieth Day / Counting the Omer
technique: canvas 2D Fourier epicycles / DFT-driven animation

title: The Night Turns Toward Morning
tagline: star trails rotate through Tikkun Leil Shavuot from midnight to dawn
theme: Tikkun Leil Shavuot / Night Vigil and Dawn
technique: WebGL fragment shader / procedural star field, GLSL star trails, 2D canvas overlay

title: Seven Weeks of Seven
tagline: the seven-fold Omer count drawn as a hypotrochoid rose — seven petals for seven weeks
theme: Sefirat HaOmer — Seven Weeks / Kabbalistic Sefirot
technique: canvas 2D hypotrochoid spirograph (roulette curve), progressive stroke animation

title: The Fifty Gates
tagline: the gates of Binah rendered as Bayer-dithered thresholds — forty-nine crossed, one beyond reach
theme: Sefirat HaOmer — The Fifty Gates of Binah / Shavuot
technique: canvas 2D Bayer 4×4 ordered dithering, ImageData pixel manipulation, sequential cell animation

title: Where You Go
tagline: Ruth 1:16 — two figures built from a thousand crossed threads, leaning toward each other
theme: Book of Ruth / Ruth 1:16 — Loyalty and Covenant
technique: canvas 2D greedy string art — signed-distance-field silhouette, pin-and-thread portrait

title: A Consuming Fire
tagline: the glory of the LORD like a consuming fire on the top of the mountain — Exodus 24:17
technique: WebGL fragment shader / domain-warped fBm plasma, mountain SDF

title: Before Every Nation
tagline: each kingdom refused — one remained; recursive Mondrian subdivision of the Torah's offer
theme: Matan Torah / The Torah Offered to All Nations
technique: canvas 2D — recursive Mondrian subdivision, sequential dimming, color interpolation

title: Burning to the Heart of Heaven
tagline: Sinai rendered as a topographic contour map — the mountain burning to the heart of the sky
theme: Har Sinai / Deuteronomy 4:11 — the Mountain of Revelation
technique: canvas 2D simplex-noise terrain, topographic contour band rendering, animated particle smoke column
